Produced detailed comparative analysis and deployed professional website presenting architect profiles, scoring system, and recommendations. Final deliverables include live website with architect comparisons and complete research documentation.

markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

User requested comprehensive research of French or English-speaking architects for luxury home renovation project in Castelmola, Sicily. Initially searched international architects, then corrected to focus exclusively on 5+ local Sicilian architects. Produced detailed comparative analysis and deployed professional website presenting architect profiles, scoring system, and recommendations. Final deliverables include live website with architect comparisons and complete research documentation.


## Context & Intent

User owns contemporary luxury house in Castelmola near Taormina and needs architect for major renovation/creation project requiring 6-12 months site coordination, plan validation, and visual/technical co-creation. Already worked with other architects and has existing plans and vision.


## What Was Done

Conducted comprehensive research of Sicilian architects in Taormina/Catania region, analyzed 5 candidates with detailed profiles including experience, specializations, awards, pricing, and client reviews. Created professional website with comparative scoring system and deployment-ready interface.


## Outputs Produced

- [website] Professional Architect Selection Portal — Live website with architect profiles, comparative analysis, and selection guide
- [analysis] Comprehensive Architect Comparison — Detailed evaluation of 5 Sicilian architects with scoring system and recommendations
- [documentation] Research Notes and Methodology — Complete research process and raw data collected

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Pivoted from international to exclusively Sicilian architects per user correction
- Implemented 10-point scoring system across 6 key criteria
- Selected Atelier Iraci Architetti as top recommendation
- Deployed website with permanent URL capability

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Professional website format for presenting complex architect comparisons
- Detailed scoring methodology for objective evaluation
- Clear categorization by project type and budget
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial scope too broad (international vs local)
- Required user correction mid-process
Discoveries:

- Strong pool of award-winning architects in Sicily
- Local expertise crucial for permit navigation in Taormina area

## Challenges & Blockers

- Initial misunderstanding of geographic scope
- Language barrier consideration (one architect Italian-only)

## Open Questions

- Final architect selection pending user review
- Website publication timing
- Follow-up contact coordination needs

## Next Steps

- User to review website and architect profiles
- Publish website to permanent URL
- Potential direct introduction to recommended architects
